title: Creeper no Break Blocks
description: A simple mod that prevents creepers from destroying blocks when they explode. Players still take damage
body:
![blast resistant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe61215a4c1c2669f121e885dbdee5f4025f9989.jpeg)
# Creeper No Break Blocks

## Keep your world intact while still keeping the challenge

**This lightweight mod prevents creepers from breaking blocks when they explode.**  
Players still take damage and creeper explosions still happen. The world just stays safe.

Great for:

- Family friendly worlds  
- Younger players  
- Modpacks and servers where you do not want to disable mob griefing entirely  
- Builders who hate repairing craters

---

## Multiplayer and Single Player Support

### ✔ Single Player
Install on the **client** and play. No extra setup needed.

### ✔ Multiplayer Servers
Install on the **server only**.  
Clients do not need to install the mod.

---

## Simple. Lightweight. No configuration required.

Just drop it in, restart, and play.

---

> 💡 **Feature Requests and Version Support**
>
> Have a feature idea or want support for another Minecraft version?  
> **Open an issue on the project page and let me know.**
